label: Cinder Cantina Loftroom
description: Cinder Cantina Loftroom occupies a cramped upper recess above the slagcrete vault, its walls faced in soot-stained plasteel and black basalt block. A narrow cot-frame and riveted locker are bolted directly to the masonry, leaving a central strip of vitrified flagstone perpetually filmed with ash. Bruised violet light bleeds through a shuttered grille tied to the cantina’s conduit runs, while vox-baffling panels and a heavy hatch maintain the tavern’s sealed, pressurized character. The air carries a persistent metallic tang from intake grilles and insulated piping that threads the ceiling ribs.
